name: 9ui-meter
title: Meter
author: borabaloglu
description: Displays a labeled scalar value within a known range using semantic meter markup.

changes: Changed the cn import from the upstream alias to the copied source-local helper and stopped forwarding root-only props and className to the meter track.

modifications.change: Repointed the cn alias to the copied helper and removed root props and className from Meter.Track.
modifications.reason: Keep the item self-contained while preventing duplicate IDs, ARIA attributes, value props, and root styling on the visual track.
